allow: Bash(git -C /Users/jackvanderpump/Repos/electoral-awards-website add pages/awards/index.tsx pages/awards/schedule.tsx pages/awards/whatsapp.tsx pages/awards/winners.tsx src/data/faq.ts src/data/judges.ts src/data/organisers.ts src/data/schedule.ts pages/awards/2025/index.tsx pages/awards/2025/schedule.tsx pages/awards/2025/winners.tsx src/data/faq2025.ts src/data/judges25.ts src/data/organisers25.ts src/data/schedule2025.ts public/img/logos/comelec.png)

Bash(git -C /Users/jackvanderpump/Repos/electoral-awards-website commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Archive 2025 awards and launch 2026 site for Manila

Archive the 21st Awards \(Gaborone, 2025\) into /awards/2025/ and update
the main /awards/ pages for the 22nd Awards \(Manila, 25–28 Nov 2026\)
co-hosted with COMELEC.

- Create 2025 archive data files \(schedule2025, organisers25, faq2025, judges25\)
- Create /awards/2025/ pages \(index, schedule, winners\) following 2024 pattern
- Update main data files for 2026 \(schedule, organisers, faq, judges placeholder\)
- Update /awards/ index with Manila/COMELEC details and previous years links
- Update schedule page for 2026 dates
- Update winners page to show 2025 as most recent with year links
- Replace WhatsApp page with placeholder for 2026
- Fix ICPS typos in new organisers data \(Stduies → Studies, Kingdon → Kingdom\)
- Add COMELEC logo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(.claude/skills/apple-mail-inbox/reply.sh \\
  --sender "hongpyoahn@aweb.org" \\
  --body "Dear Max and Ina,

Thank you again for circulating the electoral workforce survey — we very much appreciate AWEB's support.

I wanted to share some exciting news: the 22nd International Electoral Awards & Symposium will be taking place from 29 November to 3 December 2026 at The Manila Hotel, Philippines, co-hosted with the Commission on Elections of the Philippines \(COMELEC\).

Given AWEB's presence in the region, it would be wonderful to have you join us. Accommodation is provided for all delegates at the venue. Please do let me know if you would be interested in attending, and I can share further details.

I hope you are both well." \\
  --cc "s.ramsurrun@parlistudies.org" \\
  --cc "ikim@aweb.org")

Bash(.claude/skills/apple-mail-inbox/reply.sh \\
  --sender "hongpyoahn@aweb.org" \\
  --body "Dear Max and Ina,

Thank you again for circulating the electoral workforce survey — we very much appreciate AWEB's support.

I am pleased to share that the 22nd International Electoral Awards & Symposium will take place from 29 November to 3 December 2026 at The Manila Hotel, Manila, Philippines. We are co-hosting this year's edition with the Commission on Elections of the Philippines \(COMELEC\).

The programme will include two days of symposium panels and keynote sessions, a cultural tour, and the Awards Ceremony on the final evening. Accommodation at The Manila Hotel is provided for all delegates. You can find full details, including the schedule and award categories, on our website: electoralnetwork.org

Given AWEB's strong presence in the Asia-Pacific region, it would be wonderful to have you and colleagues join us in Manila. We would also warmly welcome any nominations for the awards — details on categories and how to submit are available at electoralnetwork.org/awards

Please do let me know if you have any questions or would like to discuss further." \\
  --cc "s.ramsurrun@parlistudies.org" \\
  --cc "ikim@aweb.org")

Bash(.claude/skills/apple-mail-inbox/reply.sh \\ --sender "hongpyoahn@aweb.org" \\ --html \\ --body "

Dear Max and Ina,

Thank you again for circulating the electoral workforce survey — we very much appreciate AWEB's support.

I am pleased to share that the 22nd International Electoral Awards & Symposium will take place from 29 November to 3 December 2026 at The Manila Hotel, Manila, Philippines. We are co-hosting this year's edition with the Commission on Elections of the Philippines \(COMELEC\).

The programme will include two days of symposium panels and keynote sessions, a cultural tour, and the Awards Ceremony on the final evening. Accommodation at The Manila Hotel is provided for all delegates. You can find full details, including the schedule and award categories, on our website: electoralnetwork.org

Given AWEB's strong presence in the Asia-Pacific region, it would be wonderful to have you and colleagues join us in Manila. We would also warmly welcome any nominations for the awards — details on categories and how to submit are available at electoralnetwork.org/awards

Please do let me know if you have any questions or would like to discuss further.

" \\ --cc "s.ramsurrun@parlistudies.org" \\ --cc "ikim@aweb.org")
